steps.title: Use a participial modifier
steps.content: The sentence already has a main clause: "the Pyramid of Userkaf is one of the oldest known structures in the world." After the comma, the blank should begin a participial phrase modifying the pyramid.

steps.title: Reject nonparticiples
steps.content: Choice A is an infinitive, Choice B is a finite verb that would create a run-on, and Choice C is a base-form verb without a subject. The remaining option is a present participle that fits the modifier. The answer is D.
